subcodes.first_line: O Peerless Beloved! O Incomparable Love! Thanks be unto Thee that Thou hast favored this hapless wanderer with all bounties and bestowals [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دلبر يکتا ای محبوب بيهمتا شکر ترا که اين بيچاره آواره را به جميع عنايات و الطاف مفتخر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @firmness in the Covenant
